dataFlows.transformKql:
source
| extend
    detection_object = todynamic(iif(isempty(tostring(detection)), '{}', tostring(detection))),
    host_object = todynamic(iif(isempty(tostring(host)), '{}', tostring(host)))
| project
    TimeGenerated = now(),
    child_process_iocs_s = iif(isnotempty(tostring(child_process_iocs_s)), tostring(child_process_iocs_s), tostring(child_process_iocs)),
    cross_process_iocs_s = iif(isnotempty(tostring(cross_process_iocs_s)), tostring(cross_process_iocs_s), tostring(cross_process_iocs)),
    host_os_family_s = iif(isnotempty(tostring(host_os_family_s)), tostring(host_os_family_s), iif(isnotempty(tostring(host_os_family)), tostring(host_os_family), tostring(host_object.os_family))),
    host_os_version_s = iif(isnotempty(tostring(host_os_version_s)), tostring(host_os_version_s), iif(isnotempty(tostring(host_os_version)), tostring(host_os_version), tostring(host_object.os_version))),
    host_name_s = iif(isnotempty(tostring(host_name_s)), tostring(host_name_s), iif(isnotempty(tostring(host_name)), tostring(host_name), tostring(host_object.name))),
    host_full_name_s = iif(isnotempty(tostring(host_full_name_s)), tostring(host_full_name_s), iif(isnotempty(tostring(host_full_name)), tostring(host_full_name), tostring(host_object.full_name))),
    identities_s = iif(isnotempty(tostring(identities_s)), tostring(identities_s), tostring(identities)),
    tactics_s = iif(isnotempty(tostring(tactics_s)), tostring(tactics_s), tostring(tactics)),
    process_iocs_s = iif(isnotempty(tostring(process_iocs_s)), tostring(process_iocs_s), tostring(process_iocs)),
    file_modification_iocs_s = iif(isnotempty(tostring(file_modification_iocs_s)), tostring(file_modification_iocs_s), tostring(file_modification_iocs)),
    network_connection_iocs_s = iif(isnotempty(tostring(network_connection_iocs_s)), tostring(network_connection_iocs_s), tostring(network_connection_iocs)),
    registry_modification_iocs_s = iif(isnotempty(tostring(registry_modification_iocs_s)), tostring(registry_modification_iocs_s), tostring(registry_modification_iocs)),
    detection_id_s = iif(isnotempty(tostring(detection_id_s)), tostring(detection_id_s), iif(isnotempty(tostring(detection_id)), tostring(detection_id), tostring(detection_object.id))),
    detection_url_s = iif(isnotempty(tostring(detection_url_s)), tostring(detection_url_s), iif(isnotempty(tostring(detection_url)), tostring(detection_url), tostring(detection_object.url))),
    detection_headline_s = iif(isnotempty(tostring(detection_headline_s)), tostring(detection_headline_s), iif(isnotempty(tostring(detection_headline)), tostring(detection_headline), tostring(detection_object.headline))),
    detection_details_s = iif(isnotempty(tostring(detection_details_s)), tostring(detection_details_s), iif(isnotempty(tostring(detection_details)), tostring(detection_details), tostring(detection_object.details))),
    detection_severity_s = iif(isnotempty(tostring(detection_severity_s)), tostring(detection_severity_s), iif(isnotempty(tostring(detection_severity)), tostring(detection_severity), tostring(detection_object.severity)))
